case_title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP vs. YEARBY, MELVIN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEARBY, MELVIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1000 MARKET STREET, SUITE 301, STAYED UNTIL JUL-13-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, PLF WAIVES DEF'S SHARE OF THE RENT. IF DEF. SURRENDERS KEY BY 5:00 PM. AND LEAVES PREMISES CLEAN, PLF WILL STIPULATE TO VACATE JUDGEMENT AND DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. DEF WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT.
